goal: Построить и проверить base-conditional overlay модели (veto / early-cut / hold-extension) на trade surface immutable базы active-signal-v1@1, чтобы улучшить качество уже существующих сделок без изменения базовой логики.
global_constraints: active-signal-v1@1 is immutable: never retune, reselect, or modify base signals, thresholds, hours, days, or execution logic
full-surface directional classification on leadership/breadth/path-asymmetry/regime features is permanently closed (v4–v7 terminal verdict)
CatBoost regression on future PnL is permanently closed
classifier-transition as standalone directional layer is permanently closed
all labels must be frozen before any model training begins
no threshold or feature selection on lockbox window — selection OOS only
all comparisons are matched: same trade window, same notionals, strict overlay evaluation against immutable base
veto route must show signal before opening early-cut; early-cut must show signal before opening hold-extension
all datasets are trade-level (entry-timestamp keyed), not anchor-level

slices.title: Feature contract для trade-quality overlays
slices.hypothesis: Design, validate, publish, and materialize the complete trade-quality feature layer across families A–D (entry context, post-entry path, exit context, cross-confirmation), with veto-priority features built first.
slices.objective: Design, validate, publish, and materialize the complete trade-quality feature layer across families A–D (entry context, post-entry path, exit context, cross-confirmation), with veto-priority features built first.
success_criteria: all priority-1 veto features validated, published, and materialized with warmup_ok and coverage_ok
priority-2 and priority-3 features at minimum contracted even if materialization is deferred
no feature leaks future information (causality check passed)
feature-level summary table completed (name, family, priority, validated, published, materialized, warmup_ok, coverage_ok)
evidence_requirements: all priority-1 veto features validated, published, and materialized with warmup_ok and coverage_ok
priority-2 and priority-3 features at minimum contracted even if materialization is deferred
no feature leaks future information (causality check passed)
feature-level summary table completed (name, family, priority, validated, published, materialized, warmup_ok, coverage_ok)

slices.title: Dataset split и modeling surfaces для overlays
slices.hypothesis: Create frozen trade-level train/selection-OOS/lockbox-OOS splits keyed by entry timestamp with purge gaps ≥24h, and assemble all modeling surfaces (all, long-only, short-only, weak-window).
slices.objective: Create frozen trade-level train/selection-OOS/lockbox-OOS splits keyed by entry timestamp with purge gaps ≥24h, and assemble all modeling surfaces (all, long-only, short-only, weak-window).
success_criteria: three-way split frozen with documented train/selection/lockbox windows
purge gaps ≥24h verified between all adjacent windows
all four modeling surfaces assembled with correct feature + label joins
split_method, label_contract, features_used, target_mean recorded in dataset metadata
evidence_requirements: three-way split frozen with documented train/selection/lockbox windows
purge gaps ≥24h verified between all adjacent windows
all four modeling surfaces assembled with correct feature + label joins
split_method, label_contract, features_used, target_mean recorded in dataset metadata

slices.title: Veto-route plausibility stage
slices.hypothesis: Train and evaluate CatBoost veto classifiers (balanced + conservative, long + short) on the training surface and assess on selection OOS whether any model can reliably identify the worst base trades.
slices.objective: Train and evaluate CatBoost veto classifiers (balanced + conservative, long + short) on the training surface and assess on selection OOS whether any model can reliably identify the worst base trades.
success_criteria: all 4 veto models trained with frozen labels and features
selection OOS metrics computed: AUC, PR AUC, precision in veto bucket
economic effect on selection OOS quantified (delta PnL if top-risk trades removed)
clear pass/fail determination: at least one model shows meaningful veto signal (AUC meaningfully above 0.50 with positive economic effect)
evidence_requirements: all 4 veto models trained with frozen labels and features
selection OOS metrics computed: AUC, PR AUC, precision in veto bucket
economic effect on selection OOS quantified (delta PnL if top-risk trades removed)
clear pass/fail determination: at least one model shows meaningful veto signal (AUC meaningfully above 0.50 with positive economic effect)
